name: Growth Layer Agent Helper
description: Exposes the currently focused window's application id over D-Bus (org.growthlayer.AgentHelper on the org.gnome.Shell connection) so the Growth Layer desktop agent can attribute activity to an app on GNOME. Never exposes window titles, keystrokes, or pointer coordinates -- only which app is focused, mirroring the same narrow contract the agent already uses on X11/Hyprland/Windows/macOS.
